269 I0400_CAD_CD I0400_CAD_CD I0400 Active Diagnoses: Coronary Artery Disease (CAD) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had a diagnosis of coronary artery disease (CAD) (e.g., angina, myocardial infarction, and arteriosclerotic heart disease (ASHD) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no
